prompt: Create a cinematic cold sci-fi scene in a vertical 4:5 frame from an extreme high-angle overhead camera, looking down into a vast oppressive concrete testing courtyard. The environment is a circular Chinese courtyard-inspired laboratory chamber made of wet dark stone, steel-gray concrete walls, mint-green cyan light accents, exposed black cables, drainage seams, and glossy rain-slick floor reflections. In the lower center foreground stands one small sharp figure: a cat-eared cyberpunk girl named VOXCAT, treated like an abnormal experimental sample rather than a cute mascot. She has pale mint hair, glowing translucent cat ears, a cropped white and mint tactical outfit, straps, thigh harnesses, arm sleeves, chunky boots, and a small shoulder marking reading “VOX CAT”; her face is deliberately obscured by a smooth gray anonymizing blur, making her feel monitored and dehumanized. The composition must emphasize environmental pressure: the character is small, centered below the huge circular arena, with massive walls and architectural rings dominating her. Include exactly one large circular test platform in the middle, one raised central disk, one dark sealed doorway at the far wall, two concrete blocks in the front left and front right foreground, one stylized cat/fox laboratory emblem on the upper left wall, one RX-07 emblem on the right foreground block, and one handwritten VOXCAT signature at the bottom right. Text elements: on the back wall place 情感实验第7区, beneath it 理性优先 情感禁止, and on the doorway lintel small text reading 观测中｜非参与者禁止入内. On the central disk write “关系实验场 RX-07”. Around the circular floor ring place three visible Chinese warning labels: “接近＝风险”, “亲密＝变量”, and “情绪＝噪声”. Lighting should be low-key, teal-cyan and steel gray, with low saturation, hard concrete texture, wet specular highlights, volumetric haze, surveillance-camera unease, and a cinematic dystopian laboratory mood. Use a wide-angle lens, deep depth of field, high-position surveillance composition, no warm colors, no crowd, no extra characters, no cute cheerful atmosphere.
